detail: User requested ASE BH/GA baselines and literature-comparable plots; prior explicit approval exists in thread.
Local ASE is 3.28.0. BasinHopping is in ase.optimize.basin. ase.ga is a placeholder and requires the separate ase-ga package.
Installed ase-ga 1.0.3 after sandbox network failure, using escalated pip install.
Added --baseline-source ase, ASE BasinHopping baseline, ASE-GA component baseline, trace support, and minima export labels.
Initial LJ13/LJ38 budget60 command with trace was killed because full ASE trace reran all algorithms and became too expensive.
Completed LJ13 budget60 ASE baseline metric and minima export.
Completed LJ38 budget60 ASE baseline metric and minima export.
Completed LJ13/LJ38 budget20 trace and curve plot.
Added pyproject optional dependency group benchmarks with ase-ga>=1.0.3.
Default internal baseline smoke completed with budget 4.
